brand_identity.name: Zuba House
brand_identity.ethos: Modern African aesthetics meets fast-fashion efficiency. Professional, minimalist, and culturally rich.
brand_identity.environment: Mobile-First Web App (PWA) mimicking Native App behavior

primary.name: Obsidian Teal
primary.usage: Headings, Primary Buttons, Active States, Bottom Nav Active

secondary.name: Savanna Peach
secondary.usage: Accents, Sale Badges, CTA Highlights, Urgency Banners

rules: Background is ALWAYS #e5e2db (Bone Cream) or #FFFFFF (White) for contrast areas.
Text is predominantly #0b2735 (Obsidian Teal). NEVER use pure black.

typography.installation: Import Google Fonts: Outfit (300, 400, 500, 700) and Plus Jakarta Sans (400, 500, 600).

mobile_first_principles: Bottom Navigation Bar is MANDATORY (Fixed at bottom).
Top Bar with Sticky Search Input.
Grid Layout: 2-column masonry for products (gap-2 or gap-3).
Touch Targets: Minimum 44px height for all interactive elements.

BottomNavigation.style: Fixed bottom, bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md, border-t border-[#0b2735]/10, active color #0b2735, inactive #0b2735/40

ProductCard.style: Vertical layout, aspect-[3/4] image, minimal details below. No borders, just whitespace.
elements: Add Button (Icon only on image bottom-right)

CategorySidebar.style: Split View: Left 25% (List of Parents), Right 75% (Grid of Children).
CategorySidebar.behavior: Left side fixed/sticky, Right side scrolls.

UrgencyBanner.style: bg-[#efb291] text-[#0b2735] px-3 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-bold flex items-center gap-2

hero_banners.alt: Two stylish women walking, hero banner
Woman in pink coat, fashion statement

instructions_to_main_agent.environment_override: The user requested React Native Expo, but the environment is REACT WEB (Vite). YOU MUST BUILD A MOBILE-FIRST PWA (Web App) that mimics a native app.
layout_rules: Do not use desktop-style headers. Use a Mobile Top Bar.
Ensure all click targets are large enough for fingers.
Use 'react-router-dom' for navigation but style it like app transitions if possible.
styling_overrides: Update tailwind.config.js to use the specific brand colors defined above.
Use 'sonner' for toasts (or react-hot-toast if sonner not available, but user pref sonner).

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
